steps.title: Subtract matching terms
steps.content: Both equations include the same $4y$ term, so subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate $y$: $$(6x+4y)-(2x+4y)=46-14$$

steps.title: Find the value requested
steps.content: After simplifying, divide by $4$ to get the value of $x$: $$4x=32$$ $$x=8$$ The answer is 8.
